title: The Squaw Man
writer: Edwin Milton Royle, Lucien Hubbard, Lenore J. Coffee
actors: Warner Baxter, Lupe Velez, Eleanor Boardman
plot: Jim Wyngate, an English aristocrat, comes to the American West under a cloud of suspicion for embezzlement actually committed by his cousin Lord Henry. In Wyoming, Wyngate runs afoul of cattle rustler Cash Hawkins by rescuing the ...
